stemHtml: A pilot has become accustomed to landing on long runways, with a high approach speed. Which of the following could happen if the pilot now attempts to land on a short runway using this same technique?

options.b: The aircraft will have too much kinetic energy, and might overshoot the runway.
options.c: The landing will be better than usual.
options.d: The aircraft will not have enough kinetic energy, and might undershoot the runway.
